deviations.what: The dragDropConfig (dnd:DragInfo + GridDropInfo) reorders items on drop; the drop event is wired to a backend event but the reorder logic (splice + setProperty) is not reproduced. The GridDropInfo control from sap.f.dnd keeps a hyphen-free 'dndgrid' xmlns alias instead of the original 'dnd-grid' (the alias only names the same sap.f.dnd URI; it makes the control statically visible to the checks).

27 items inlined from model/data.json; absent enum fields defaulted (highlight None, type Inactive) so the bound GridListItem properties stay valid. Template binds counter/highlight/type/unread + title/subtitle 1:1.
